name: Cannock South & West

links.title: Cannock South and West Neighbourhood Newsletter

description:
Local officers cover the following areas: Hatherton, Dartmouth, Carfax, Rumer Hill and Progress Drive. This is Cannock's main industrial sector as well as the central area for the town's retail parks.

There has been recent extensive urban regeneration and redevelopment including a new ice rink. The district also houses affluent areas in Shoal Hill and along the New Penkridge and Old Penkridge roads.
